requirement_topic.en: CE-Aligned Electrical Safety and Battery Standards
requirement_topic.zh: CE对齐电气安全与电池标准
requirement_topic.zht: CE對齊電氣安全與電池標準

summary.en: Switzerland relies on SNV adoption routes for relevant EN/IEC safety standards and applies CE-based product pathways where alignment is recognized. For lithium BESS, TS EN IEC 62619 is commonly used as battery safety evidence and IEC 62933-5-2 is commonly used for system-level evidence in grid-connected applications.
summary.zh: 瑞士通过SNV采标路径应用相关EN/IEC安全标准并在认可情形下采用CE产品路径。对于锂电储能，TS EN IEC 62619通常用于电池安全证据，IEC 62933-5-2通常用于并网应用的系统层安全证据。
summary.zht: 瑞士透過SNV採標路徑應用相關EN/IEC安全標準並在認可情況下採用CE產品路徑。對於鋰電儲能，TS EN IEC 62619通常用於電池安全證據，IEC 62933-5-2通常用於併網應用的系統層安全證據。

standards_or_laws: Switzerland adoption references under CE-aligned SNV/ElCom frameworks
IEC 62619 battery safety requirements for lithium-ion
IEC 62933-5-2 system safety requirements for BESS

summary.en: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium safety, and GB/T 36558 for system integration evidence. These reports support technical comparison but are not direct Swiss statutory proof by themselves.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023进行锂电安全管理，并以GB/T 36558作为系统集成证据。这些报告可用于技术比较，但本身不能直接作为瑞士法定证明。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023進行鋰電安全管理，並以GB/T 36558作為系統整合證據。這些報告可用於技術比較，但本身不能直接作為瑞士法定證明。

gap.en: Do not treat China GB/T safety reports as sufficient for Switzerland-facing placement. Exporters should build Swiss-facing evidence for model scope, voltage class, thermal design, thermal runaway mitigation, isolation and protection architecture, residual-risk evaluation, and language-ready marking.
gap.zh: 不要将中国GB/T安全报告视为瑞士市场就绪的充分依据。出口商应建立瑞士导向证据，包括型号范围、额定电压、热设计、热失控缓解、隔离与保护架构、剩余风险评估，以及可供瑞士使用的标识要求。
gap.zht: 不要將中國GB/T安全報告視為瑞士市場就緒的充分依據。出口商應建立瑞士導向證據，包括型號範圍、額定電壓、熱設計、熱失控緩解、隔離與保護架構、剩餘風險評估，以及可供瑞士使用的標識要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Swiss-facing in-scope BESS documentation requires conformity evidence under CE-aligned and Swissgrid-relevant requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Not a direct substitute for Switzerland-facing evidence. China baseline is an input only.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep a distinct Swiss-facing evidence pack for TS EN IEC standards and Swiss installation assumptions; do not repurpose China GB/T reports as final placement proof.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 需为瑞士出口准备独立的TS EN IEC证据包和瑞士安装假设文件，不应将中国GB/T报告转为最终入市证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 需為瑞士出口準備獨立的TS EN IEC證據包和瑞士安裝假設文件，不應將中國GB/T報告轉為最終入市證明。
